supported_devices: EC inline fans, clip fans, LED grow lights, heaters, humidifiers, dehumidifiers
compatible_ec_fans: Spider Farmer HEXA fans, GGS inline fans with RJ12 port
compatible_lights: Spider Farmer SF series (excl. SF300, SF600, SF1000D), G series, SE series
compatible_sensors: Spider Farmer GGS temp/humidity/light sensor (included), GGS SensorPro CO2+PPFD (optional), GGS 3-in-1 soil sensor (optional)
compatible_humidifiers: Spider Farmer humidifiers via connected GGS AC5 or AC10 power strip
compatible_irrigation: Spider Farmer drip irrigation via connected power strip and optional soil sensor
compatible_co2_equipment: any CO2 device via connected GGS power strip outlet
supported_manufacturer_series: SF series, G series, SE series, HEXA series fans
recommended_use_note: Central GGS hub for RJ12 device control; pairs with GGS AC5 (3x3 tents) or AC10 (4x4+ tents) power strip to add AC outlet management
uvp_notes: Regular retail price at GoGrow.de; official Spider Farmer EU price not confirmed directly
notes: No built-in AC outlets; requires GGS AC5 or AC10 power strip for AC outlet device control. Firmware updatable via SD card or OTA. Pre-set schedules continue running without internet. Max 10 device connections via included GGS Pro Adapter (10-port RJ12 splitter). CO2, PPFD, and soil sensors sold separately.
